name: Middle Eastern Style Beef
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Lean round steak, cut into strips
1 1/2 cups Frozen broccoli and cauliflower mix, thawed
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown beef and onion in hot butter in a large skillet.
2. Add broth, water, vegetables, raisins, lemon juice, and cinnamon to the skillet. Stir well.
3. Bring mixture to a boil.
4. Stir in rice and almonds. Cover and remove from heat.
5. Let stand for 5 minutes. Fluff with a fork. Makes 4 servings.
